description: Fix metadata duplication and implement canonical tags
steps: Identify overlapping metadata between src/app/layout.js and src/app/page.js
Ensure the root layout provides base metadata while specific pages override titles and descriptions uniquely
Implement a canonical URL generator in src/app/layout.js using the metadataBase property
Add alternating canonical tags to each individual route to prevent duplicate content issues
Update src/app/sitemap.js to dynamically include all blog posts from src/data/blogs.js
Add missing static routes to the sitemap: /blog, /security, /privacy-policy, /terms-of-service, /cookie-policy
Verify that the sitemap URL in src/app/robots.js matches the actual deployment domain
Add 'disallow' rules for any internal or temporary paths in robots.js

description: Implement Open Graph and Twitter Card metadata
steps: Add openGraph property to metadata in src/app/layout.js with site_name, locale, and type
Add twitter property to metadata in src/app/layout.js for Card summary and site handle
Implement dynamic OG images and descriptions for blog posts in src/app/blog/[slug]/page.js
Add a default OG image (e.g., /logo.png or a dedicated og-image.jpg) to the public folder
Create a JSON-LD component for Organization/LocalBusiness schema on the homepage
Implement Article/BlogPosting schema for individual blog post pages
Add WebSite schema with SearchAction for site-wide search capabilities
Verify schema implementation using the Google Rich Results Test

description: Create missing Policy and Legal pages
steps: Create src/app/privacy-policy/page.js and associated content
Create src/app/terms-of-service/page.js and associated content
Create src/app/cookie-policy/page.js and associated content
Ensure these pages follow the site's design system and include standard legal disclosures

description: Optimize Image Alt texts and accessibility
steps: Audit all Image components and replace generic alt text (e.g., 'Legal professional at work') with keyword-rich, descriptive text
Ensure all service-related images include relevant keywords (e.g., 'USPTO patent drawings', 'legal docketing')
Verify that decorative images have empty alt attributes (alt='') to be ignored by screen readers
Check that image filenames in /public/assets/ are descriptive and hyphen-separated

description: Fix broken and incorrect internal links
steps: Verify the link for 'Contact Management' in Footer.jsx (/service/paralegalsolutions-management) matches the actual route structure
Ensure all social media links in the footer have correct rel='noopener noreferrer' and aria-labels
Update internal links in AboutSection and BlogCard to ensure they point to the correct canonical paths
Audit the navigation.js data to ensure it aligns perfectly with the app directory structure
Create a reusable Breadcrumb component in src/components/ui/
Add Breadcrumbs to all sub-pages under /service/ and /blog/
Implement BreadcrumbList structured data (JSON-LD) for enhanced search result snippets

description: Audit and fix Heading Hierarchy site-wide
steps: Review every page to ensure there is exactly one H1 tag
Verify that H2-H6 tags follow a logical nested order without skipping levels
Check that section titles in service pages use H2 instead of H3 or div if they represent major topical divisions

description: Optimize favicon set and implement Web App Manifest
steps: Generate a full set of icons (16x16, 32x32, apple-touch-icon, android-chrome)
Create a manifest.json file in the public folder and link it in layout.js
Update metadata icons property to include the full set of generated icons
Add a 'title' or 'aria-label' to the video element in AboutSection.jsx
Consider adding a text transcript or fallback content for the video
Ensure the video file is optimized for fast loading (check compression and format)

description: Verify and refine keyboard navigation in ServicesDropdown
steps: Test the ArrowDown/ArrowUp and Escape key functionality in the Services dropdown
Ensure focus states are visually distinct and follow the brand's style
Confirm aria-expanded and aria-haspopup attributes are correctly toggling
